name: hep-research
description: Optional discovery of HEP literature, publication records, documents, and public result data.

interface.shortDescription: Discover HEP literature and public results.
interface.longDescription: An optional integration boundary for finding HEP papers, citations, CERN documents, publication metadata, and public HEPData tables.
defaultPrompt: Find recent LHCb papers about this topic.
Locate the HEPData record for this measurement.
Find the corresponding CERN document record.
